Wiring Harness Splice Generator - Windows Distribution

Contents:
- app.py
- wiring_harness_processor.py
- requirements.txt
- install_windows.bat
- run_app.bat
- input\ (place your input Excel files here)
- output\ (optional folder for generated files)

Setup on Windows:
1. Copy this folder to a Windows machine.
2. Open this folder.
3. Double-click install_windows.bat (first time only).
4. Double-click run_app.bat to launch the app.
5. Browser will open Streamlit UI.

Usage:
- Upload your input Excel file in the app.
- Download generated output Excel from the app.

Notes:
- Requires Python 3.10 or newer.
- If Windows asks for firewall access, allow local access for Python/Streamlit.
